name: Creamed Tuna & Peas/English Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 Whole-grained English Muffins -- split and lightly toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add flour, salt, pepper, and bay leaf to the hot oil. Stir constantly for 1 minute.
3. Gradually add milk and sherry while stirring constantly until the mixture thickens, about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and discard the bay leaf.
5. Meanwhile, cook peas according to package instructions (about half as long as stated). Drain them.
6. Flake the tuna with a fork. Add the cooked peas and flaked tuna to the sauce, mixing well.
7. Heat the mixture thoroughly.
8. Spoon 3/4 cup of the mixture onto each split English muffin.
9. Serve immediately.
